title: CSS Marble Run / Pachinko Machine
description: A 2D physics sandbox pachinko machine with custom circle-circle and circle-OBB collision detection, interactive obstacle placement, gravity-driven marble simulation, and multi-tier scoring pockets.
author: Girish Madarkar
features: Interactive obstacle editor supporting circle pegs and ±35° angled ramps
Custom 2D bounding-box collision engine (circle-circle, circle-OBB) with elastic bounce coefficients
Continuous gravity vector integration via requestAnimationFrame pipeline
Six-tier scoring pocket array (10x–100x multipliers) with capture detection
Visual feedback system: impact ring particles and score burst animations
Runtime diagnostics showing active marble count and cumulative score
